ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Precise timestamp of the data collection */,
  "seconds_elapsed" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds since the last recorded data */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the aircraft */,
  "qx" REAL /* Quaternion x component */,
  "qy" REAL /* Quaternion y component */,
  "qz" REAL /* Quaternion z component */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the aircraft */,
  "qw" REAL /* Quaternion w component */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the aircraft */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the aircraft during data collection */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the aircraft during data collection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the aircraft's position during data collection */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the aircraft's position during data collection */,
  "validity_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data is considered valid or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the aircraft */,
  "total_flight_hours" REAL /* Total flight hours of the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft being tested */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the test session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the test session */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the test */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the test */,
  "test_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator conducting the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location on the aircraft where the sensor is mounted */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session from which data was uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the data */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded data file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the upload failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion data entry */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to assess data quality (e.g., accuracy, consistency) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality assessment */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the quality check was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of what the test involves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)
